label: Listen to the Maple Street story
prompt: Create a warm, trustworthy educational narration for an adult beginner. Speak naturally and conversationally, with gentle curiosity rather than advertising energy. Use a calm pace, clear pauses, and subtle emphasis on ownership, one of twenty, and five percent. Do not read these directions aloud. Spoken transcript: Samira places twenty identical tiles on the counter. Pretend these measure all the ownership, she says. One tile would measure one of twenty equal units, or five percent. But it would not be the stove, a shelf, or five percent of the floor. A share is a measured ownership unit connected to the company as a whole. It can rise or fall in value, because ownership includes risk.
